findings.title: GitHub OAuth Token in Plaintext .env
findings.notes: Token must be revoked by user at github.com/settings/tokens. .env patterns added to .gitignore.

findings.title: CDN Dependency Without SRI
findings.notes: Awaiting user decision: bundle locally vs SRI vs post-load verification. TODO added in code.

findings.title: Inline Event Handlers (CSP Bypass)
findings.notes: Replaced with addEventListener delegation using capture:true for load/error events

findings.title: No URL Validation on TVA Cache Fetch
findings.notes: Added origin validation and credentials:'omit'. Review fix: urlError.errorType (not .code).

findings.title: Worker Message Handler Without Input Validation
findings.notes: Already had switch/default with validation; added console.warn for unknown commands

findings.title: Error Stack Traces Exposed
findings.notes: Removed stack from postMessage, log full error to console only. Review fix: cleaned stale stack destructuring in IndexService.

findings.title: tinymce XSS (transitive dev dep)
findings.notes: Dev dependency only, not shipped. No production impact.

findings.title: No Protocol Validation on Image Paths
findings.notes: Added javascript:/data:/vbscript: protocol rejection in sanitizePath()

findings.title: IndexedDB/localStorage Data Without Schema Validation
findings.notes: Larger refactor needed. TODO added in code. Existing JSON.parse try-catch provides baseline protection.

findings.title: Build Script Variable Injection Risk
findings.notes: Added strict regex validation for VERSION and MODULE_ID before use

findings.title: Silent Error Handling Patterns
findings.notes: Added console.warn to all empty catch blocks. Review fix: use full error objects, not e.message.

findings.title: Hardcoded Fallback Image Path
findings.notes: Extracted to FALLBACK_IMAGE constant, used via addEventListener

findings.title: Console Logging Sensitive Paths
findings.notes: console.warn in sanitizePath() is intentional for security debugging

findings.title: Window Global Exposure
findings.notes: Object.freeze reverted during review (breaks mutable singleton). Standard Foundry practice. Would need proxy/facade pattern for proper isolation.

findings.title: Filter Term localStorage Without Length Limit
findings.notes: Added 200-char max length check in loadFilterTerm()
